personal.name: Kritesh Shiwakoti
personal.headline: Master of Science in Information System | Certified Jenkins Engineer | Certified SAFe 5 Practitioner | Certified Microsoft Azure – AZ 900

objective: To obtain a challenging position with an accelerating company to utilize my technical skills along with my experience in the fields of Software Configuration Management, and Build and Release Engineering.
professionalSummary: Experienced in Software Configuration and Release Management as CM specialist.
Vast experience in streamlining ITIL processes i.e. Incident, Change, Release and Problem Management
Strong IT experience as a Business Management Lead and Designer with Java/J2EE and .NET experience in various sectors of business.
Performed SCM tasks like branching, merging and tagging source code.
Experienced in writing hooks/trigger scripts for enforcing various CM policies and procedures.
Created scripts for periodic backups of Subversion (SVN) repositories, TFS and ClearCase using rsync and cron.
Experienced in integrating JIRA and other Atlassian products with Subversion (SVN) and ClearCase for the change management process.
Very good at creating customized CM plan and process for software development and integration in small as well as globally distributed large teams based on Best CM Practices.
Enriched with skill sets: Oracle ADF, Oracle JDeveloper, Core Java, XML, HTML, SQL, C++, NetBeans, Eclipse, winScp, Subversion (SVN), Emma, PMD, JXplorer, Ant.
Utilized Ant and Maven for Java based builds in Linux and Windows environments.
Debugged and remedied various Ant, MSBuild and Maven issues ranging from slow builds to modularization.
Automated repetitive tasks using Perl and Shell Scripting.
Experience in implementing the continuous integration process utilizing Quickbuild and Jenkins.
Developed branching schemes for major and minor version releases of software projects.

responsibilities: Experience with SVN and Quickbuild, Jenkins as an administrator.
Involved in deploying package to Web, App and Various Server of CVS Health Location.
Modularized unstructured Ant and Maven scripts and utilized properties file for reducing complexity.
Wrote Ant/Maven build scripts for creating jar, war and ear artifacts, deployed to Tomcat, Jboss, Weblogic, Apache, and Cloud Platform
Configured Mobile application automated builds. Installed Certificate and Profile for iOS application.
Configured local Maven repositories and multi-component Ant projects in Quickbuild and Jenkins for CI.
Installed 3rd Party Jar package to Maven/Nexus/Artifactory Repository, maintaining project dependencies.
Created/Used ANT and Maven tasks for compilation, linking, creating directories, environment variables, .zip, .jar files.
Implemented automated software build, testing, and deployment with Quickbuild/Jenkins.
Wrote Shell scripts to automate the Build and Release process.
Maintaining deployment according to RFC timing.
Implemented Junit test cases for Testing App and Web configuration.
Setup and configured Build and Deployment process for Continuous Integration and Release Management.
Configured Quickbuild for build related notifications including email and IDE.
Set up continuous deployment to Tomcat using Quickbuild.
Monitored Jobs status using Gearman Dashboard and creating automated build reports.
